title: Anna University Notification 2026 - Apply for Various Project Assistant Posts
description: Anna University has released the official notification for the recruitment of various Project Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the Anna University Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply on or before the last date ...
